title: WaitingTime
description: Adds a pong game to play while the pack is loading
body:
This mod adds a pong game while the pack is loading.

The pong game is playable using your mouse, playing against an AI.

The points don't matter.

The game ends when the pack is loaded.

If you would like to support me in my modding endeavors, you can become a patron via  Patreon.
